briefdescription.para: Whether the full surface swap is required.
True if EGL config needs rebuilding (set from main thread, read on render thread)
Whether the depth buffer is required.
Whether the stencil buffer is required.
Whether partial update is required.
multi-sample-anti-aliasing level (0 - not required)
The background color of the surface.
Constructor Inlined as this is a pure abstract interface.
Virtual Destructor. Inlined as this is a pure abstract interface.
Return the size and position of the surface.
Get DPI.
Return the orientation of the surface.
Return the orientation of the screen.
InitializeGraphics the platform specific graphics surface interfaces.
Creates the Surface.
Destroys the Surface.
Replace the Surface.
Resizes the underlying surface.

parameterdescription.para: The dimensions of the new position

briefdescription.para: Sets the size of the surface.

parameterdescription.para: The new size of the surface

briefdescription.para: Called when Render thread has started.

memberdef.argsstring: (bool resizingSurface, const std::vector< Rect< int > > &damagedRects, Rect< int > &clippingRect)=0
memberdef.name: PreRender

briefdescription.para: Invoked by render thread before Core::RenderScene If the operation fails, then Core::Render should not be called until there is a surface to render onto.

parameterdescription.para: True if the surface is being resized
List of damaged rects this render pass

simplesect.para: True if the operation is successful, False if the operation failed

briefdescription.para: Invoked by render thread after Core::RenderScene.
Invoked by render thread when the thread should be stop.
Invoked by Event Thread when the compositor lock should be released and rendering should resume.
Sets the ThreadSynchronizationInterface.
Gets the surface type.
Makes the graphics context current.
Sets a Scene that is rendered on this surface.
Forces full surface swap next 2 frames, resets current partial update state.

simplesect.para: Could be called at main thread.

briefdescription.para: Forces full surface swap current frames, resets current partial update state.

simplesect.para: Should be called at render thread.

briefdescription.para: Get whether full surface swap required current frames.

simplesect.para: True if full surface swap required.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the depth buffer is required for this surface.

parameterdescription.para: True if depth buffer is required

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the depth buffer is required for this surface.

simplesect.para: True if depth buffer is required

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the stencil buffer is required for this surface.

parameterdescription.para: True if stencil buffer is required

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the stencil buffer is required for this surface.

simplesect.para: True if stencil buffer is required

briefdescription.para: Sets whether partial update is required for this surface.

parameterdescription.para: True if partial update is required

briefdescription.para: Gets whether partial update is required for this surface.

simplesect.para: True if partial update is required

briefdescription.para: Sets the multi-sample anti-aliasing level for this surface.
Gets the multi-sample anti-aliasing level for this surface.
Marks that the surface EGL config needs to be rebuilt.

simplesect.para: Thread-safe: may be called from the main thread while the render thread reads it.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether the surface EGL config needs to be rebuilt.

simplesect.para: True if the config is dirty and needs rebuilding

briefdescription.para: Clears the surface config dirty flag after rebuild.
Undefined copy constructor. RenderSurface cannot be copied.
Undefined assignment operator. RenderSurface cannot be copied.
Interface for a render surface onto which Dali draws.

detaileddescription.para: Dali::Adaptor requires a render surface to draw on to. This is usually a window in the native windowing system, or some other mapped pixel buffer.
Dali::Application will automatically create a render surface using a window.
The implementation of the factory method below should choose an appropriate implementation of RenderSurface for the given platform
